proposed.claim: Skills coordinate authoring, query, and presentation: `/assert` adds beliefs from artifacts, entities, or reasoning; `/assert-session` persists session rules and agent error patterns; `/assertions` queries and traverses the graph; `/materialize` turns directives into concrete tasks; `/present-codepath` walks a codepath - a code-anchored collection rendered as a narrated, branching tour of real source that can also run as a test suite (`mix cb.verify.codepath`).

reasoning: cb-schema-v2: /materialize operates on directives (you do not materialize a theory).
